title: ZymoBIOMICS MagBead DNA/RNA Protocol
author: ZYMO Research Corp.
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bktxkwpn

steps.title: All centrifugation steps should be performed...
steps.instruction: All centrifugation steps should be performed at 10,000 - 16,000 x g for 30 seconds, unless specified. For 96-well lysis rack, centrifuge at 4,000 x g for 5 minutes. All steps should be performed at room temperature (20-30oC), unless specified. 750 µL, DNA/RNA Shield A Add to a sample 250 uL max.input and mix and/or homogenize. %s %s At this point, samples in DNA/RNA Shield can be stored at ambient temperature (4-25°C) for a month, 3 days at 37°C, or long-term (> 1 year) -20°C or below.

steps.title: 200 µL, DNA/RNA Lysis Buffer Add...
steps.instruction: 200 µL, DNA/RNA Lysis Buffer Add to 200 ul sample and mix well.

steps.title: 500 µL, DNA/RNA Lysis Buffer Add...
steps.instruction: 500 µL, DNA/RNA Lysis Buffer Add to the 200 ul sample and mix well.

steps.title: 400 µL, ethanol (95-100%) Add to...
steps.instruction: 400 µL, ethanol (95-100%) Add to the sample and mix well.

steps.title: 30 µL, ZymoBIOMICS MagBinding Beads Add...
steps.instruction: 30 µL, ZymoBIOMICS MagBinding Beads Add and mix well for 20 minutes. Important: ZymoBIOMICS MagBinding Beads settle quickly, ensure that beads are kept in suspension while dispensing.

steps.title: go to step #11 Repeat once
steps.instruction: go to step #11 Repeat once.

steps.title: DNase I treatment (optional)
steps.instruction: DNase I treatment (optional)

steps.title: 30 µL, ZymoBIOMICS MagBinding Beads Add...
steps.instruction: 30 µL, ZymoBIOMICS MagBinding Beads Add and mix well for 20 minutes. Important: ZymoBIOMICS MagBinding Beads settle quickly, ensure that beads are kept in suspension while dispensing.

steps.title: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic stand until beads (DNA) have pelleted, then transfer the cleared supernatant (RNA) into a new plate/tube.

steps.title: To achieve unbiased lysis of different...
steps.instruction: To achieve unbiased lysis of different organisms, including hard-to-lyse microbes, perform mechanical homogenization3 (Recommended e.g., lysis tubes S6012-50 or lysis rack S6002-96-3; each sold separately). Then centrifuge to pellet debris and transfer 200 μl supernatant to a new tube.

steps.title: Add 10 μl Proteinase K for every 200 μl sample
steps.instruction: Add 10 μl Proteinase K for every 200 μl sample. Mix and incubate at room temperature (20-30oC) for 30 minutes.

steps.title: Proceed to Total Nucleic Acid Purification,...
steps.instruction: Proceed to Total Nucleic Acid Purification, page 4 or DNA and RNA Purification, page 5.

steps.title: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic stand until beads have pelleted, then aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant.

steps.title: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 1 Add and mix well
steps.instruction: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 1 Add and mix well. Pellet the beads discard the supernatant.

steps.title: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 2 Add and mix well
steps.instruction: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 2 Add and mix well. Pellet the beads discard the supernatant.

steps.title: 500 µL, ethanol (95-100%) Add and mix well
steps.instruction: 500 µL, ethanol (95-100%) Add and mix well. Pellet the beads discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Dry the beads for 10 minutes or until dry
steps.instruction: Dry the beads for 10 minutes or until dry.

steps.title: Add 50 μl DNase I Reaction...
steps.instruction: Add 50 μl DNase I Reaction Mix and mix gently for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Add 500 μl DNA/RNA Prep Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μl DNA/RNA Prep Buffer and mix well1 for 10 minutes. Pellet the beads2,3 and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: go to step #11 Repeat once
steps.instruction: go to step #11 Repeat once.

steps.title: To elute DNA/RNA from the beads,...
steps.instruction: To elute DNA/RNA from the beads, add 50 μl ZymoBIOMICS DNase/RNase- Free Water and mix well1 for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic stand until beads have pelleted, then aspirate and dispense the eluted DNA/RNA to a new plate/tube.

steps.title: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 1 Add and mix well
steps.instruction: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 1 Add and mix well. Pellet the beads and discard the supermatant.

steps.title: go to step #21 Repeat once
steps.instruction: go to step #21 Repeat once.

steps.title: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 2 Add and mix well
steps.instruction: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 2 Add and mix well. Pellet the beads and discard the supermatant.

steps.title: 500 µL, ethanol (95-100%) Add and mix well
steps.instruction: 500 µL, ethanol (95-100%) Add and mix well. Pellet the beads and discard the supermatant.

steps.title: Dry the beads for 10 minutes or until dry
steps.instruction: Dry the beads for 10 minutes or until dry.

steps.title: 50 µL, ZymoBIOMICS DNase/RNase-Free Water Add...
steps.instruction: 50 µL, ZymoBIOMICS DNase/RNase-Free Water Add and mix well for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic stand until beads have pelleted, then aspirate and dispense the eluted DNA to a new plate/tube.

steps.title: 700 µL, ethanol (95-100%) Add to...
steps.instruction: 700 µL, ethanol (95-100%) Add to the supermatant and mix well.

steps.title: 30 µL, /well ZymoBIOMICS MagBinding Beads...
steps.instruction: 30 µL, /well ZymoBIOMICS MagBinding Beads Add and mix well for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic stand until beads (DNA) have pelleted, then transfer the cleared supernatant (RNA) into a new plate/tube.

steps.title: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 1 Add and mix well
steps.instruction: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 1 Add and mix well. Pellet the beads discard the supernatant.

steps.title: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 2 Add and mix well
steps.instruction: 500 µL, MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 2 Add and mix well. Pellet the beads discard the supernatant.

steps.title: 500 µL, ethanol (95-100%) Add and mix well
steps.instruction: 500 µL, ethanol (95-100%) Add and mix well. Pellet the beads and discard the supermatant.

steps.title: go to step #25 Repeat once
steps.instruction: go to step #25 Repeat once.

steps.title: DNase I treatment (optional)
steps.instruction: DNase I treatment (optional)

steps.title: Add 50 μl DNase I Reaction...
steps.instruction: Add 50 μl DNase I Reaction Mix and mix gently for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Add 500 μl DNA/RNA Prep Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μl DNA/RNA Prep Buffer and mix well1 for 10 minutes. Pellet the beads2,3 and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: go to step #25 Repeat once
steps.instruction: go to step #25 Repeat once.

steps.title: Dry the beads for 10 minutes or until dry
steps.instruction: Dry the beads for 10 minutes or until dry.

steps.title: 50 µL, ZymoBIOMICS DNase/RNase-Free Water Add...
steps.instruction: 50 µL, ZymoBIOMICS DNase/RNase-Free Water Add and mix well for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic stand until beads have pelleted, then aspirate and dispense the eluted DNA to a new plate/tube.
